hero.subtitle: Discover Vietnam's intangible cultural heritage. Explore craft villages, ceremonies, folk songs, and traditional knowledge — unlock locations, meet AI heritage keepers, and earn rare cultural collectibles.
hero.subtitleEn: Explore Vietnam's intangible cultural heritage. Discover craft villages, ceremonies, folk music, and traditional knowledge — unlock locations, meet AI heritage keepers, and earn rare cultural collectibles.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Open the map, tap a mist node, and travel to a nearby craft village.
howItWorks.step2Desc: GPS confirms location → watch video → chat with AI artisan → take a field photo.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive 1–3 cultural items with varying rarity. Build your personal museum.

creatorCta.title: Are you a heritage keeper?
creatorCta.desc: Artisan, performer, elder, storyteller — register your site and reach thousands of young heritage explorers.
creatorCta.descEn: Artisan, performer, elder, storyteller — register your heritage site and reach thousands of GenZ explorers.

login.tagline: Preserve your own Vietnamese cultural heritage journey.

geolocationGate.title: Explore heritage around you
geolocationGate.subtitle: Like Pokémon GO, Heritage Wander guides you to cultural sites nearby. Allow location to unlock the full experience.
geolocationGate.denied: Location denied. Go to browser settings to re-enable, or tap the map to set position manually.

fogOfWarMap.moveHint: Travel to a heritage site to unlock it
fogOfWarMap.tapHint: Tap a node to approach · Chạm vào địa điểm để tiếp cận
fogOfWarMap.devMode: Dev: click map to set fake position

stepNpc.greeting: Hello! I am {name}, {role} at {location}. It's great to meet you here. What would you like to ask me?

stepPhoto.cameraHint: Take a field photo to confirm your presence

museum.title: My
museum.subtitle: Discover Vietnamese cultural heritage — monuments, landmarks, and intangible culture from across the country.
museum.subtitleEn: Discover heritage sites, landmarks, and intangible culture across Vietnam.

trade.title: Item Trading
trade.subtitle: Trade duplicate items with friends. Coming soon.
trade.subtitleEn: Trade duplicate items with friends. Coming soon.

emptyCollection.title: No items yet
emptyCollection.subtitle: Explore craft villages to start collecting.

create.title: Share
create.subtitle: Are you a heritage knowledge holder? Choose your role and start sharing.

tiers.tier1Desc: Artisan, performer, elder, storyteller, traditional healer, ceremony keeper… Register your heritage site and share your story.
tiers.tier1DescEn: Artisan, performer, elder, storyteller, traditional healer, ceremony keeper… Register your heritage site and share your story.
tiers.tier2Desc: Create heritage routes connecting multiple nodes into themed journeys.
tiers.tier2DescEn: Create heritage routes connecting multiple nodes into themed journeys.
tiers.tier2Earnings: Earn subscription fees + tips from explorers
tiers.tier2EarningsEn: Earn subscription fees + tips from explorers
tiers.tier3Desc: Culture departments, UNESCO orgs, cultural NGOs — add official verified heritage layers.
tiers.tier3DescEn: Culture departments, UNESCO orgs, cultural NGOs — add official verified heritage layers.

location.title: Your
location.subtitle: The craft village or artisan site you want to register.
location.gpsNote: Or select directly on the map in the full version.

story.title: Craft
story.subtitle: Share the knowledge and history of your craft.
story.summaryPlaceholder: Describe the history, techniques, and what makes this craft village special...

npc.title: AI
npc.subtitle: Define 3–5 questions and answers for the NPC representing you.
npc.answerPlaceholder: The artisan's answer (written in first person)...

challenge.title: Photo
challenge.subtitle: What photo should explorers take to confirm their presence at the site?
challenge.descPlaceholder: E.g. Take a photo of the incense drying rack in sunlight...

review.title: Ready to
review.subtitle: Your site will be reviewed by the Heritage Wander team and Tier 3 community before appearing on the map.

admin.title: Verifier
admin.subtitle: Quality Control & Community Trust
admin.selectPrompt:
Select a submission
to begin review
admin.confidenceWarningDesc: Step 03 may be local folklore rather than scientific necessity. Verifier must confirm cultural significance.
admin.provenanceVerified: Provenance verified via Elder Consent ID:

navigation.sectionSubtitle: Choose how you travel across Vietnam

gps.label: GPS Location
gps.description: Travel to real physical locations to unlock them.

manual.label: Travel by Click
manual.description: Click on the map to approach heritage sites.
